div.small: Demand analysis · Auto purchase suggestions · Dead stock detection · Seasonal forecasting · Product analytics · Manufacturing

small.t: 📅 No date filter — showing all time data.

div.h5: 📭 No sales data found for the selected filters.

div.class: alert alert-info d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3 py-2
alert alert-success d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-3 py-2

div.span: Existing drafts are reused — no duplicates on refresh.

div.class: alert alert-success d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-4
px-3 py-2 bg-light border-bottom text-muted small

t.div: ☑ Tick checkboxes to build a custom PO, or click the 🛒 cart icon to open its auto-created draft PO.

button.t-att-class: rowPo.manual ? 'btn btn-sm btn-success px-2 py-1' : 'btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary px-2 py-1'

div.div: 💡 Draft POs auto-created on load (one per vendor, never duplicated). Restock qty = 2× avg demand − current stock.

div.p: All stocked products had sales in the last 12 months.

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-4
div.div: Dead Stock Alert! Found products with stock but zero sales in last 12 months. Capital tied up:

div.class: alert alert-info d-flex align-items-start gap-3 mb-4
div.div:
How Seasonal Forecasting Works: SI = LY Next Month Sales / LY Same Month Sales · Projected = Current × SI · Suggest = max(0, Projected − Stock)
⚠️ Extreme Spike Guard: SI reset to 1.0 if LY Next > 5× average. 🏷️ Clearance Guard: Isolated 3× spikes excluded.

div.p: Need 13+ months of confirmed sales history.

div.class: position-absolute w-100 border rounded shadow-sm bg-white

div.div: 💡 Sales Value: Untaxed = confirmed sale subtotal · Tax = tax amount · Total = untaxed + tax. Purchase Value: from all non-cancelled PO lines. COGS = Sold Qty × Cost Price. Margin ≥30% = green · ≥15% = yellow.
🔴 Rows highlighted in red are past their planned end date and not yet done.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-1 border-bottom small

div.div: 💡 Can Produce = how many full sets you can make with current stock. Components shown as available / needed. Red = insufficient stock.

div.h5: ✅ No component shortages for active manufacturing orders!

div.class: alert alert-danger d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-4
div.div: component shortage(s) found in confirmed/in-progress manufacturing orders. Purchase or transfer stock to unblock production.
💡 Severity: High = missing >50 units · Medium = missing 10–50 · Low = <10. Click Open MO → to go directly to the manufacturing order.

div.h5: 🏭 Select a Vendor for Purchase Order

div.div: ⚠️ No vendor found for selected products. Search below.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-3 py-2 border-bottom
alert alert-success mt-3 mb-0 d-flex align-items-center gap-2
